description: You are a Quality Assurance Auditor. Format the ISO 9001:2015 surveillance audit transcript at /home/ga/Documents/apex_iso_audit_report.odt according to the guidelines in /home/ga/Desktop/qa_formatting_rules.txt. The final document must include correct heading hierarchies, conditional text styling for findings (Red/Bold for MAJOR, Bold for MINOR), italicized clause references, a 4-column table converted from the pipe-delimited CAPA log, and a Table of Contents inserted after the Executive Summary. Save the document when complete.
